ogTitle: Brownlow Ki vs Brukunga: Climate Safety

heading: Brownlow Ki vs Brukunga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brownlow Ki, South Australia and Brukunga, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brownlow Ki has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Brukunga (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brownlow Ki or Brukunga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brownlow Ki has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Brukunga scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brownlow Ki scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Brukunga scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brownlow Ki or Brukunga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brownlow Ki has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
